title: TESSAN Universal Travel Adapter 28W, Worldwide Plug Adaptor with 2 USB A and 3 USB C Ports, International Travel Adapter for EU, UK, USA, AU, Power Socket Charger for Multi Countries, Grey White
features: Worldwide Travel Adapter: This international travel adapter covers over 150 countries: Type C for most of France, Germany, South Korea, Spain; Type G for UK, Ireland, London, Scotland; Type I for Australia, China, Argentina; Type A for Japan, USA, Mexico

6 in 1 Travel Plug: Travel adapter worldwide has 1 universal AC Outlet (2500W Max) and 5 USB (3 USB C); The front universal AC outlet can be adapted to sockets used in different countries; This travel charger can charge 6 devices at the same time

International Travel Adapter with USB C: Universal plug adaptor features USB C1 C2 C3 (15W MAX per port), quickly charge phone, tablet, and other devices, reducing waiting time; The USB A1 A2 deliver 12W MAX per port and meets your various charging needs

Space Saving: The size of this worldwide travel adapter are 6.4 × 5.5 × 5 cm; The all in one design universal adapter meets many needs on your trip and saves luggage space without having to carry additional adapters

Warm Tips: The universal travel adapter worldwid with double 10A fuse protect your devices; Universal adapter plug works on 100V to 250V wide voltage devices, If you want to use hair dryer, straightener, curling irons, they need to support wide voltage
description: Product Description Type C Plug Use in Europe, Italy, Spain, France, Portugal, Greece, Iceland, Germany, Switzerland, Netherlands, Turkey, Norway, Poland, Denmark, etc Type A Plug Use in Japan, Mexico, Canada, America, Philippines, China, Peru, Thailand, Colombia, Guatemala, Bolivia, Panama, Cuba, etc Type I Plug Use in Australia, New Zealand, China, Argentina, Fiji, Samoa, Tonga, Cook Islands, Kiribati, New Guinea, Tuvalu, Vanuatu, etc Type G Plug Use in UK, Ireland, London, Scotland, Kenya, Dubai, Singapore, Hong Kong, Tanzania, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Malaysia, etc Not a Voltage Converter Please make sure devices to support Simple and Convenient Push and slide to use (Can't push out all pins at once) Compare with Different Travel Adapters from TESSAN USB-C Universal Adapter Add To Basket USB-C Universal Adapter Add To Basket USB-C Universal Adapter Add To Basket USB-C Universal Adapter Add To Basket Universal Travel Adapter Add To Basket USB-C Universal Adapter Add To Basket USB-C Universal Adapter Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.7 out of 5 stars 2,082 4.6 out of 5 stars 2,753 4.6 out of 5 stars 252 4.6 out of 5 stars 2,561 3.9 out of 5 stars 81 4.5 out of 5 stars 66 4.5 out of 5 stars 113 Price £23.99 £ 23 . 99 £16.99 £ 16 . 99 £20.99 £ 20 . 99 £16.69 £ 16 . 69 £56.08 £ 56 . 08 £37.04 £ 37 . 04 £27.99 £ 27 . 99 Qty of USB A Ports 2 2 2 2 1 2 2 Qty of USB C Ports 3 2 2 2 3 2 3 USB Output(Total) 28W 20W 20W 20W 140W 65W 35W Plug Type Type C/G/A/I Type C/G/A/I Type C/G/A/I Type C/G/A/I Type C/G/A/I Type C/G/A/I Type C/G/A/I Compatible Countries Europe, USA, UK, Australia Europe, USA, UK, Australia Europe, USA, UK, Australia Europe, USA, UK, Australia Europe, USA, UK, Australia Europe, USA, UK, Australia Europe, USA, UK, Australia
